zh.lifeSummary: 當Sybille de Hauteville於1058年出生在義大利普格利亞時，她的父親Roberto "Giscardo" de Hauteville43歲，母親Sikelgaita of Salerno19歲。她和Ebles II de Ramerupt至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1090年在法國享年32歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sybille de Hauteville于1058年出生在意大利普格利亞时，她的父亲Roberto "Giscardo" de Hauteville43岁，母亲Sikelgaita of Salerno19岁。她和Ebles II de Ramerupt至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1090年在法国享年32岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sybille
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Sybil
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Sybille de Hauteville was born in 1058, in Puglia, Italy, her father, Roberto "Giscardo" de Hauteville, was 43 and her mother, Sikelgaita of Salerno, was 19. She had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Ebles II de Ramerupt. She died in 1090, in France, at the age of 32.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sybille de Hauteville est née en 1058, à Puglia, Italie, son père, Roberto "Giscardo" de Hauteville, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Sikelgaita of Salerno, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Ebles II de Ramerupt. Elle est décédée en 1090, à France, à l’âge de 32 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sybille de Hauteville 1058 in Puglia, Italien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roberto "Giscardo" de Hauteville 43 und ihre Mutter Sikelgaita of Salerno 19. Sie hatte mit Ebles II de Ramerupt mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1090 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sybille de Hauteville è nata il nel 1058 nel Puglia, Italia, sua padre, Roberto "Giscardo" de Hauteville, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Sikelgaita of Salerno, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Ebles II de Ramerupt. Morì nel 1090, nel Francia, all'età di 32 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sybille de Hautevilleが1058年にイタリアプウグリアで生まれた時，父Roberto "Giscardo" de Hautevilleは43歳，母Sikelgaita of Salernoは19歳であった。彼女はEbles II de Rameruptとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1090年にフランスで32歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sybille de Hauteville(이)가 1058년 이탈리아 푸그리야에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roberto "Giscardo" de Hauteville(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sikelgaita of Salerno(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 Ebles II de Ramerupt(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1090년 프랑스에서 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sybille de Hauteville nasceu em 1058, em Puglia, Itália, seu pai, Roberto "Giscardo" de Hauteville, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Sikelgaita of Salerno, tinha 19 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Ebles II de Ramerupt. Ela faleceu em 1090, em França, com 32 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sybille de Hauteville родилась в 1058 г. в местности пугля, Италия, её отцу по имени Roberto "Giscardo" de Hauteville было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Sikelgaita of Salerno, 19. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Ebles II de Ramerupt. Она умерла в 1090 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 32 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sybille de Hauteville nació en 1058, en Puglia, Italia, su papá, Roberto "Giscardo" de Hauteville, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Sikelgaita of Salerno, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Ebles II de Ramerupt. Murió en 1090, en Francia, a la edad de 32 años.
